reviews.comment:
Lugar muy completo para descansar a comer algo y cargar combustible para seguir viaje!! Excelente el YPF Full  que tiene comida vegetariana en su menú

(Translated by Google)
A great place to rest, grab a bite, and refuel before continuing your journey! The YPF Full station is excellent, especially since they have vegetarian options on the menu.
